title: File created as 'Untitled' with incorrect MIME type
symptom: When uploading a file using the multipart upload endpoint, the resulting file is created as 'Untitled' with the MIME type 'application/octet-stream'.
applies_when: Using Google Drive API for multipart uploads
not_this_if: File is created successfully with the correct name and MIME type
Using standard JSON body for file creation
root_cause: This issue occurs when the multipart data is not formatted correctly, leading Google Drive to default to a generic file name and MIME type. This can happen if the required headers are missing or if the boundary is not properly defined.
fix_steps: Ensure that the multipart data includes the correct headers, including 'Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary'.
Double-check the formatting of the multipart body to ensure it adheres to the required structure.
agent_instruction: Add the 'Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary' header to the multipart data and verify the formatting.
